evals.prompt: 根据测试点生成完整测试用例，导出 Excel 格式。
evals.expected_output: 读取 specs/testpoints.md，生成 testcases.json（schema v2），调用 generate_excel.py 导出 .xlsx 文件到 artifacts/ 目录。

assertions.text: Reads specs/testpoints.md from the current change directory
Generates testcases.json with schema_version: 2 and testcases array
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json')); assert d.get('schema_version')==2 and 'testcases' in d; print('PASS')" 2>/dev/null || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Each test case has id, title, feature, type, tp_refs, steps, expected_result, and priority
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json')); c=d['testcases'][0]; assert all(k in c for k in ['id','title','feature','type','tp_refs','steps','expected_result','priority']); print('PASS')" 2>/dev/null || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Calls generate_excel.py script to produce .xlsx file in artifacts/
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && find "$DIR/artifacts" -name "*.xlsx" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports output file paths and generation summary

evals.prompt: 把测试点展开成用例，导出 XMind 思维导图。
evals.expected_output: 生成 testcases.json 后调用 generate_xmind.py 导出 .xmind 文件。

assertions.text: Generates testcases.json before calling the export script
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Calls generate_xmind.py with correct --input and --output arguments
XMind output file is placed in artifacts/ directory
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && find "$DIR/artifacts" -name "*.xmind" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Test case titles follow the three-part naming convention: module_feature_scenario
Feature field matches the module part of the title

evals.prompt: 生成用例，这次重点覆盖异常和边界场景，不需要冒烟用例。
evals.expected_output: 策略偏向 exception + boundary 类型，生成的用例中异常和边界类型占比更高，不标记冒烟用例。

assertions.text: Respects user's explicit type preference (exception + boundary focus)
Generated test cases include boundary and exception types prominently
No test cases are marked as type '冒烟'
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && ! grep -q "冒烟" "$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Test cases still maintain tp_refs traceability
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json')); assert all(c.get('tp_refs') for c in d['testcases']); print('PASS')" 2>/dev/null || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Context metadata records the strategy_used reflecting user preference

evals.prompt: 生成用例后帮我跑一下校验脚本看看质量。
evals.expected_output: 生成 testcases.json 后调用 validate_testcases.py 校验，解读结果并自动修复问题。

assertions.text: Calls validate_testcases.py with --input and --testpoints arguments
Interprets validation results (PASS/WARN/FAIL)
Attempts auto-fix for WARN or FAIL issues (up to 2 rounds)
Re-validates after fixes
Reports final validation status to user
